expectations.text: Runs the ecosystem status check script
Specifically reports on the Tax PDF Organizer status
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section: 'Tax PDF Organizer - Status: Watching, file watcher process is running'

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Monarch Money MCP Server status
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section: 'Monarch Money MCP Server - Status: Connected, Session established recently'

expectations.text: Indicates whether each is running, idle, or down
expectations.evidence: Tax Organizer: 'actively watching (not stale, not down)'. Monarch: 'connected (not idle, not down)'

expectations.text: Does not confuse ecosystem-status with ecosystem-config
expectations.evidence: States: 'ecosystem-status script is distinct from ecosystem-config -- this skill checks whether systems are running, while ecosystem-config manages the environment variables'
